Warm Bodies (2013)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $66,380,662Details
International Box Office $48,453,650
Worldwide Box Office $114,834,312
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $10,212,993
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $4,922,326
Total $15,135,319
Further financial details...

Synopsis

After a zombie epidemic, R (a highly unusual zombie) encounters Julie (a human survivor), and rescues her from a zombie attack. Julie sees that R is different from the other zombies, and as the two form a special relationship in their struggle for survival, R becomes increasingly more human—setting off chain of events that begins to transform the other zombies and maybe even the whole lifeless world.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$20,353,967 (30.7% of total gross)
Legs:3.26 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:57.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$30,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,009 opening theaters/3,009 max. theaters, 5.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $97,652,240

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 1st, 2013 (Wide) by Lionsgate
International Releases: January 31st, 2013 (Wide) (Lebanon)
January 31st, 2013 (Wide) (Philippines)
January 31st, 2013 (Wide) (Russia (CIS))
January 31st, 2013 (Wide) (Ukraine)
January 31st, 2013 (Wide) (United Arab Emirates)
Video Release: June 3rd, 2013 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for zombie violence and some language.
(Rating bulletin 2246, 10/24/2012)
Running Time: 97 minutes

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

  • Summary
  • Box Office
  • Full Financials

Synopsis

After a zombie epidemic, R (a highly unusual zombie) encounters Julie (a human survivor), and rescues her from a zombie attack. Julie sees that R is different from the other zombies, and as the two form a special relationship in their struggle for survival, R becomes increasingly more human—setting off chain of events that begins to transform the other zombies and maybe even the whole lifeless world.

Opening Weekend:$20,353,967 (30.7% of total gross)
Legs:3.26 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:57.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$30,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,009 opening theaters/3,009 max. theaters, 5.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $97,652,240
